prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: near-foreground rhythmic accent cutout for scene 4 of a 16:9 Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style sample and defines paper fibers and restrained accent colors
Primary request: a small group of separated celadon water droplets crossing diagonally from lower-left toward center, plus three tiny restrained gold-paper flecks confined near the grinding-contact area; large transparent gaps
Style/medium: handcrafted paper cutouts, crisp deckled edges, matte mineral pigments
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background
Constraints: uniform key background; no people, hands, text, watermark or logo; no #ff00ff in artwork; complete separated shapes
Avoid: explosion, lens flare, dense spark shower, photoreal droplets
